title: anthemis secundiramea subsp. intermedia
intro: Anthemis secundiramea subsp. intermedia, also known as Golden Yarrow, is a subspecies of the Anthemis genus, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Golden Yarrow include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Golden Yarrow is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
